name: Creme De Cassis Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; press in the bottom and up the sides of a 10-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. Beat the cream cheese and 1-1/4 cups sugar at high speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add creme de cassis and salt; mix well.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, beating just until blended after each addition. Fold in shaved chocolate.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes.
6. Combine the sour cream, 1/4 cup sugar, and almond extract. Spread over cheesecake.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes. Refrigerate cheesecake immediately for at least 8 hours.
8. Garnish with additional shaved white chocolate.
